name: Linked Hull
desc: A large number of complex systems, that link various systems throughout the vessel. For example, they overclock the maneuvering thrusters to counteract the angular momentum upon the total loss of some engines, which of course needs to be repaired upon restoring symmetrical thrust. All this allows large vessels to function just like smallers ones.

name: Linked Targeting
desc: A large number of complex systems, that links the recoil dampening sequences vessel wide. It allows for effective and controlled fire on very large vessels and is useless on regular sized vessels. It allows large vessels to fire just like smallers ones.
